subject: Fw: weather
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: LVJET@aol.com

Date: Wed, 10 Oct 2007 17:15:33 
To:kellens@earthlink.net
Subject: weather


Istanbul, Turkey, Partly cloudy Thursday and Friday, 73 high temperature, lows 64 degrees, 
                         Rain for Saturday and Sunday. 
Visa for Istanbul is 30 min car ride from airport to visa center for processing. Crew and passengers. 
Tel Aviv,- sunny skies Thur - Monday, high temperature 83 degrees, lows 69 degrees. 
LV
